feed.title: AO3 - Evan "Buck" Buckley/Eddie Diaz (9-1-1 TV) (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Evan "Buck" Buckley/Eddie Diaz (9-1-1 TV) on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: Still Breathing
entry.summary:
Author: Tigercher11

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,403Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 0

Summary: Everyone believes Buck died during the attack on Steve, Danny and Buck. Buck wakes up bruised, broken, and alive with no memory beyond the moment Wyatt let him go beneath the water. Trapped in the past and certain the world has already moved on without him, Buck struggles to survive in the space between what he remembers and what actually happened. Part two begins where the truth fractures — and the consequences finally catch up.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: A Year Of You And Me
entry.summary:
Author: LibbyWrites

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 14,207Chapters: 135/?Kudos: 92

Summary: In spite of his skepticism, Eddie decides to start journaling, following his therapist's advice. The man gives him a list of 365 prompts and questions to write about each day, to help him untangle the mess his brain has become. Under the knots, he might find much more than just peace of mind.

entry.title: The trials and tribulations of the best speech ever written : A love story in twenty six slides
entry.summary:
Author: noa_bn

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,049Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 0

Summary: "C'mon Eddie, it could be so fun." Buck's eyes were bright with excitement, almost vibrating where he stood in Eddie’s kitchen. The moment he'd stumbled across the pitch and pair video yesterday, his first thought hadn't been "this is a good idea". It had been : "I need to convince Eddie to do it". Because it was perfect. Eddie desperately needed to dive back into the dating pool and the traditional way wasn't working, and hadn't been working for a long time to be honest. But that was it, Buck had found it, Eddie would just have to sit there while Buck did what he did best : ramble about his best friend. And honestly, who knew Eddie Diaz better than Buck ? OR Buck convinces Eddie to participate in “pitch and pair LA” and realizes mid-speech that he doesn’t want Eddie to be with someone else.

entry.title: Lost and Found-The TRUE story about Evan Buckley
entry.summary:
Author: Bellaromanza

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 62,290Chapters: 8/?Kudos: 192

Summary: Buck always felt like he didn't belong.Little did he know he belonged to two dynasties, and the truth will change his life in the best of ways.Also, Christopher is the best part of Eddie's mess.

entry.title: You're A Liability (You're A Little Much For Me)
entry.summary:
Author: JustAnotherWriterInTheDark

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 29,989Chapters: 8/?Kudos: 64

Summary: After the tsunami hit LA ,Buck is having a hard time trusting himself again. He feels like he is slowly slipping trough the cracks and he is doing it all alone. All he wants is to go back to his family, to be a part of the team again, to be where he belongs. But what if they don’t want him back? What if they don’t trust him either?…This is my take on how I think the tsunami-and-Buck-suing-the-department storyline would have effected him and his relationship with Eddie, Chris and the 118. I often feel like they should have made Buck suffer more in the aftermath. (sorry not sorry) Oh also I scratched the whole underground fighting storyline because it gives me the ick. (gave Eddie something else to cry about though) xx

entry.title: Little One
entry.summary:
Author: Nana_Raptor

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 455,646Chapters: 59/?Kudos: 596

Summary: A fairly ordinary morning is turning into a nightmare of unreal propotions:Buck has to deal with an unexpected turn of events, and his family has to deal with the consequences.While everyone tries to uphold their hopes that he's out there, Buck fights to keep his sanity and to find a way to keep himself alive.---or: A very dark and explicit fiction about Buck being victim to a predetor who is in over his head (even if he doesn't know just yet), when he tries to get away with kidnapping someone, who is dear and important to a certain fire fam.

entry.title: Second Chances
entry.summary:
Author: starylighting

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 869,251Chapters: 88/?Kudos: 127

Summary: Bobby and Athena are just two people trying to put their lives back together while figuring out how to co-parent. What starts as a complicated plan to foster kids in need slowly turns into something much deeper. Through the ups and downs of heartbreak, healing, and raising children who’ve been through so much, they find strength in each other. Over time, their partnership grows into love, and together, they build a story about family, trust, and second chances.

entry.title: Evergrowing
entry.summary:
Author: starylighting

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 639,514Chapters: 81/?Kudos: 35

Summary: Athena and Bobby are learning that parenting doesn’t end when the kids turn eighteen. With three grown children and two still at home, Bobby and Athena find themselves navigating new challenges at every stage of life. Each child carries their own struggles, some spoken and some hidden, but together the family works through the ups and downs with love, patience, and resilience. At the heart of it all, they’re reminded that family is a bond that grows, shifts, and deepens, no matter how old the kids get.

entry.title: Wait for me to come Home
entry.summary:
Author: NCW_46

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,390Chapters: 1/5Kudos: 5

Summary: Captain Mehta needs a mentor for his new reckless probie for a few months. Enter Eddie Diaz. An exploration of the unintentional isolation of Eddie Diaz, his disposition to help without expecting anything in return, the firefam facing the possibility of losing Eddie to another firehouse, and the Buckley-Diazes redefining their family beyond the firehouse. Title from Photograph by Ed Sheeran

entry.title: a study in pink
entry.summary:
Author: lindraice

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,790Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 35

Summary: Eddie huffed out a laugh. "I appreciate the concern, but I think I'd be able to handle myself against Craig, the fifty-four year old business rep who smells like ham." He said, taking a big bite of his cookie.Hen chuckled, shaking her head. "No, I just mean, like-the Uber thing as a whole, I guess. With that ass, you could've just slapped on a pair of panties and took a couple pictures, and boom, you'd make five hundred in, I don't know, probably an hour?"Eddie choked on his snickerdoodle.Huh??"Hmfp??" Eddie tried to speak through the mouthful of crumbs he had, though with the way his eyes had widened, staring at Hen as he sat stock-still, it was clear she had taken him off guard.And she really, really had. Panties? What was she even suggesting?ORBuck walks into Eddie trying on panties for the first time. They both act normal about it.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Replaced
entry.summary:
Author: Second_starr

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,118Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 81

Summary: Christopher has always secretly loved when people mistook Buck for his dad. He never said it out loud. Not to Eddie. Not to Buck. Definitely not to anyone else. But every time someone smiled at them at the zoo and said “Your son is adorable,” Every time a teacher assumed Buck was Mr Diaz, every time automatically corrected people with a soft, “Actually, I’m…” before Chris could pretend for a second longer. Christopher loved it. Because Buck chose him. Every single day. He was his Buck. OR Christopher is struggling to understand where he fits into Buck’s life now he has Theo

entry.title: We Keep Doing This
entry.summary:
Author: FancyMeetingYouHere

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,419Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 52

Summary: “So, you’re saying,” Eddie starts carefully, hoping beyond hope he’s wrong about this, “that Christopher can, in fact, lose you.” Buck stays serious. He’s fucking serious. “Yes,” he says, as if that didn’t just blow Eddie’s chest wide open.   Or, the conversation I wish they'd had after the kidnap-debacle. (Buck still doesn't say anything about sacrificing himself for Eddie, but they get to the root of the problem anyway.)

entry.title: God Gives Many Signs
entry.summary:
Author: goldenbuck118

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,559Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 95

Summary: Father Brian runs into Eddie at a farmer’s market and immediately realizes three things: Eddie still has the mustache. Eddie somehow acquired another child. Eddie and Buck are apparently not together despite being the most married unmarried pair Father Brian has ever witnessed. Naturally, he decides divine intervention is necessary. Or Father Brian takes one look at Buddie, says absolutely not, and meddles accordingly.

entry.title: Ocean steppin' on shores (crash the wave, then I pause)
entry.summary:
Author: our_tears_dont_dry_the_same

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,329Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 3

Summary: Eddie Diaz, (ex)world champion, returns to surfing after a life changing wipe out that put a temporary stop to his career. Spurred on by grit, the loving ire of his son and his coach’s dogged determination, he is set on getting his title back. Or more accurately, ripping it from the hands of that smug, self-assured asshole Evan Buckley who is currently clutching what is rightfully his.

Author: Rebekkajade97

entry.title: contact high
entry.summary:
Author: madforyou

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 16,795Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 282

Summary: Eddie touches Buck a lot. It’s a thing they do, has been for years, and it’s not a big deal. Eddie’s an affectionate guy. Side hugs and arm grabs and that move where Eddie steers him through doorways with a hand on his lower back. All of which Buck has never spent any real time considering because it’s just Eddie, it’s just how he is. Eddie touches people and Buck just happens to be the person standing next to him most of the time, so it’s aimed at him most of the time. Proximity and frequency, that’s all. A coincidence. They’re close. They always have been. So what? All that being said, there is one thing Eddie doesn’t do. Eddie doesn’t kiss Buck. Or — didn’t. Past tense, until about thirty seconds ago, when Eddie leaned across their table at the diner they’re currently eating at and pressed his mouth to Buck’s cheek like the kiss was just another item on a list of things he was doing that afternoon. Or,The totally natural and platonic long-term friendship escalation of kissing your best friend on multiple parts of his body without explanation.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Borrowed space
entry.summary:
Author: Buddiemax

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 16,380Chapters: 6/7Kudos: 26

Summary: After a pipe bursts and floods his apartment, Buck shows up at Eddie’s late at night, needing a place to stay. While he’s welcomed into the warmth of Eddie and Christopher’s home, Buck can’t ignore the strange tension in his chest—something about being there feels both right and unsettling at the same time.

entry.title: Only You Belong There
entry.summary:
Author: blackrose_17

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,290Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 77

Summary: "I can't believe that you did this! That you could betray Buck like this! He is supposed to be your brother! Does Maddie know that you would hurt her brother like this?" In hindsight, Chimney should have seen this coming. He couldn't help but wonder if this was another reason Bobby took time off. Okay, so no one could have predicted that Bobby and Athena's attempt at a vacation would be the same time that Buck would be gone. With Buck gone, Eddie was on edge, and he was making it everyone's problem. No one wanted to work with an emotionally unstable Eddie when Buck wasn't around. Eddie doesn't react well to Sam/Max appearance at the 118th.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply
  • Evan "Buck" Buckley/Eddie Diaz (9-1-1 TV)
  • Evan "Buck" Buckley
  • Eddie Diaz (9-1-1 TV)
  • Henrietta "Hen" Wilson
  • Howie "Chimney" Han
  • Established Evan "Buck" Buckley/Eddie Diaz
  • Girl Dad Evan "Buck" Buckley
  • Girl Dad Eddie Diaz (9-1-1 TV)
  • Bobby Nash Lives
  • He's not in it but he is alive
  • Petty Eddie Diaz (9-1-1 TV)
  • Eddie Doesn't Like Sam
  • I mean Max
  • Hen Is Amused
  • Chimney is not
